events.title: InnoGen Korea 2026 Company Trip
events.excerpt: After reaching the 2025 sales target, InnoGen Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is celebrating the achievement by giving employees a company trip to Korea in 2026.
events.html:
InnoGen Pharmaceuticals, Inc. celebrates a meaningful milestone as the company reached its 2025 sales target. In recognition of the effort, commitment, and teamwork behind that success, the company is generously giving employees a travel trip outside the country.

The destination is Korea for the 2026 company trip, a special opportunity for the InnoGen team to enjoy new experiences together beyond the workplace.

This event reflects more than a reward. It is a celebration of shared achievement, gratitude, and the people who continue to help move the company forward.
